title: DodoSpyglass [Spyglass Curios Compat]
description: Hate right-clicking your spyglass? Equip it in your Curios slot and press C to zoom. Save hotbar space instantly!
body:
# No more right-clicking an annoying spyglass on your hotbar!

**DodoSpyglass** is a lightweight, quality-of-life mod that completely changes how you use the spyglass.

Just equip your spyglass in your **Curios** or dedicated **Spyglass slot**, and you are ready to go! No more wasting valuable hotbar space or manually holding down right-click. Just press **"C"** (fully configurable) and zoom in instantly! Feel free to use this on any modpack!

***

### 🛠️ Compatibility & Technical Details

*   **Tested Version:** Fully tested and working on **Curios API 9.5.1**.
*   **Known Issue / Upcoming Fix:** The empty slot background texture currently uses a temporary placeholder. A clean, custom texture is planned for the next update!
*   **Development For Newer Versions:** Development for newer versions is planned but not immediately. If you really need this on a newer version let me know in the comments!
*   **Important Notice for 1.19.2 Users:** The version for **Minecraft 1.19.2 is currently in development**. There is an unknown bug preventing the custom Spyglass slot from generating properly. If you are a developer or have experience with Curios on this specific version and want to help, feel free to reach out in the comments!

### 🐛 Feedback & Bug Reports

Your feedback helps a lot! If you encounter any **issues, bugs, or compatibility conflicts** with other mods, please leave a comment so I can look into it!

***
